backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the crypto tracking backend, handling live price fetching via HTTP outcalls (ICP, UNI via CoinGecko), user profiles, price alerts, and role-based access control using AccessControl and MixinAuthorization mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (Top 150 dashboard, filter/control bar, price projections) to their source files, components, test IDs, and confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated JSON summary document describing the purpose and functionality of each frontend source file in the project.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point for the React app, setting the page title to 'Cryptocurrency Tracking Platform' and mounting the app at the root div.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up QueryClient with rate-limit-aware retry logic, dark-mode ThemeProvider, and renders Header, Top150Dashboard, and Footer.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Footer component displaying copyright year, a caffeine.ai attribution link with UTM params, and a CoinGecko data source note with auto-refresh interval.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky header with 'Crypto Tracker AI' branding, a live indicator badge, and a dark/light theme toggle button.
frontend/src/components/PriceProjections: React component that renders a 12-month price projection panel for a user-selected coin, featuring a searchable coin selector, a monthly low/mid/high projection table, and an Recharts area chart visualizing the forecast derived from CoinGecko 30-day history.
A paginated, sortable, and searchable dashboard table displaying the top 150 cryptocurrencies by market cap, with column-level sorting, filter bar integration, and a price projections section.
A filter bar component for the Top150 dashboard providing coin search input, sort field selection, and sort direction toggle with a reset option.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using the current Internet Identity, initializing access control and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing DFINITY Internet Identity authentication, including login, logout, and identity persistence via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching the top 150 coins from CoinGecko and 30-day historical price data for a specific coin, with in-memory caching and rate-limit handling.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file defining a dark-first crypto-themed design system with Tailwind, custom OKLCH color tokens, glassmorphism utilities, and neon glow effects for both dark and light modes.
frontend/src/lib/indicators.ts: Technical indicators library implementing RSI, EMA, MACD, and TTM Squeeze calculations from price data arrays, returning typed result objects with timestamps.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that wraps the App component with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider before mounting to the DOM.
frontend/src/utils/projections.ts: Generates 12-month log-normal price projections (low/mid/high with confidence scores) from historical prices using linear regression and volatility, plus price/number formatting utilities.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage persistence helpers and hash-cleanup support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining a dark crypto-themed design system with custom OKLCH color tokens, typography/mono fonts, glow shadows, and animation keyframes.
project_state.json: Project state manifest describing a cryptocurrency tracking dashboard (top 150 coins, filters, price projections) with versioned feature records, architectural notes, and known issues.
